## Checklist

- [ ] Header block filled out completely (title, vertical, author, dates, purpose, key tables, filters, caveats)
- [ ] File named `YYYYMM_short-description.sql`
- [ ] Added/updated row in `INDEX.md`
- [ ] If this is an analysis (not just a pull), paired `.md` writeup included
- [ ] If this replaces an older query, old version moved to `archive/` (not deleted)
